_comment: Canonical cross-language proof-of-possession vector. This SAME file is embedded in both the Go SSO server tests (sso/internal/handler/testdata/pop_vector.json) and the JS SDK tests (sso-sdk-js/packages/solanaCore/tests/fixtures/popVector.json). It pins the exact UTF-8 bytes a wallet signs, plus a real Ed25519 signature over them, so the Go BuildPopMessage and the JS buildPopMessage can never silently drift apart: each side rebuilds the message from address+nonce, asserts it equals `message`, and verifies `signature_b64` against `pubkey_b64`. Only change this file by deliberately changing the message format on BOTH sides at once.
message:
Alien SSO: prove wallet control.
Wallet: 9C6hybhQ6Aycep9jaUnP6uL9ZYvDjUp1aSkFWPUFJtpj
Nonce: Z2xvYmFsLXRlc3Qtbm9uY2U
